title: 50m x 2 Rolls Gold PVC Curling Ribbon for Balloons, Gift Wrapping, Party Decorations
features: 🎈【PRODUCT INFORMATION】Package contains 2 rolls of gold curling ribbon for balloons, each roll length is about 50 meters, wide is 5mm. 2 rolls with a total length of 100 meters can meet your various needs. (This ribbon is available in a variety of colors to suit all your needs.)
🎈【SAFE MATERIAL】This curling ribbon is made of high quality PVC with bright colors, tenacious and not easy to break, with a sense of shine.

🎈【Easy to Use】 You can use a knife or scissors to cut the ribbon to the desired length. Ribbons will curl by scraping it with a tool, convenient to use. These coloured ribbon, very shiny and bling, can enhance an added festive atmosphere.

🎈【USAGE SCENARIO】This curling ribbon is great for balloon decorations and also can decorate presents box, florist bouquet, gift wrapping, greeting cards, christmas tree decoration etc. It is suitable for many parties such as birthday, graduation, baby shower, wedding, bridal shower, children's day, mother's day, father's day, christmas, halloween, new year, carnival, valentine's day etc. It can increase the sense of decoration of the different theme party.
🎈【BUY WITH CONFIDENCE】If you have any issue about the ribbon please contact us at any time, we will answer you within 24 hours and find a best solution for you.
